hypothesis: Fine-tuning a transformer LLM on a dataset of CALPHAD-computed equilibrium phase trajectories together with JMA-simulated kinetic evolutions for the Nb–O system will increase the LLM agent’s success rate on multi-phase synthesis challenges (CP2 and CP3) by at least 50% and reduce the average number of simulator calls per successful plan by an order of magnitude compared to the prompt-tuned GPT4o baseline.
